name: RiteKit Hashtag API
description: RiteKit's Hashtag API provides real-time hashtag analytics, suggestions, auto-hashtagging, trending hashtags, Instagram banned hashtag detection, and hashtag extraction from URLs. The API helps optimize social media content by analyzing hashtag performance metrics including tweets, retweets, exposure, and engagement.
